common.tagline: Minimum theory — maximum practice. Solve tasks, earn XP, level up.

js-core.title: JavaScript Core
js-core.description: Fundamental JS concepts: closures, context, higher-order functions

js-async.title: JavaScript Async
js-async.description: Async patterns: Event Loop, Promises, async/await

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.description: Types, generics, utility types, advanced patterns

bind.title: bind
bind.description: bind creates a new function with this pre-bound to a given object. In the example below, a regular function takes a name from this and receives a greeting as an argument.

curry.title: curry
curry.description: Currying transforms a function with multiple arguments into a chain of functions, each remembering part of the arguments and waiting for the rest.
curry.beforeText: A regular function receives all arguments in one call:
curry.afterText: A curried function can receive arguments step by step:

debounce.title: debounce
debounce.description: The function delays execution until the stream of calls stops for a specified time.

deepClone.title: deepClone
deepClone.description: Deep clone creates a new object with its own nested objects and arrays. So changes to copy don't flow back to original.

deepEqual.title: deepEqual
deepEqual.description: Deep equal checks whether two values are equal by content, not just by reference.

memoize.title: memoize
memoize.description: Memoize caches function results by arguments. When called again with the same arguments, the result is taken from the cache without recomputation.

throttle.title: throttle
throttle.description: A technique to limit function calls. Throttle guarantees the function executes no more than once per specified time interval.
